[smoke] renders with all defaults (horizontal / m / low / no slot)
[smoke] renders all sizes
[smoke] renders all attention levels
[smoke] renders all orientations
[smoke] renders all slot values with children
[smoke] renders all contentAlign values
[smoke] renders all appearances
[smoke] roundCaps=true renders without crashing
[fn] default orientation is horizontal
[fn] horizontal sets aria-orientation="horizontal"
[fn] vertical sets aria-orientation="vertical"
[fn] horizontal divider has width="100%" (fills container)
[fn] vertical divider has alignSelf="stretch" (fills parent height)
[fn] size="s" horizontal — height is 0.5px (Stroke-S)
[fn] size="m" horizontal — height is 1px (Stroke-M, default)
[fn] size="l" horizontal — height is 1.5px (Stroke-L)
[fn] size="s" vertical — width is 0.5px
[fn] size="m" vertical — width is 1px
[fn] size="l" vertical — width is 1.5px
[fn] stroke scale is monotonically increasing: s < m < l
[fn] default size is "m" — height is 1px
[fn] slot="none" (default) — simple line, no text in tree
[fn] slot="none" with children — string children always render as label (no "content" prop in interface)
[fn] slot="label" with string children — text is rendered in tree
[fn] slot="label" without children — falls back to simple line (no text)
[fn] slot="label" with vertical orientation — text visible
[fn] slot="label" renders as a Text node (accessible via getByText)
[fn] slot="icon" with children — Icon component child rendered in tree
[fn] slot="icon" without children — falls back to simple line
[fn] slot="icon" vertical — Icon component child visible
[fn] slot="label" outer container retains separator role
[fn] slot="icon" outer container retains separator role
[fn] contentAlign="center" (default) — both leading and trailing lines present (2 hidden lines)
[fn] contentAlign="start" — no leading line, trailing line only (1 hidden line)
[fn] contentAlign="end" — no trailing line, leading line only (1 hidden line)
[fn] contentAlign has no effect when slot="none" — simple line still renders
[fn] contentAlign="center" with slot="icon" — two flanking lines present
[fn] contentAlign works on vertical orientation with slot="label"
[fn] attention="high" renders without crashing — highest prominence
[fn] attention="medium" renders without crashing
[fn] attention="low" renders without crashing — lowest prominence (default)
[fn] default attention is "low" — component still renders a separator
[fn] all three attention levels render the separator role
[fn] appearance="auto" resolves to neutral — renders separator
[fn] all appearance values render separator role without crashing
[fn] appearance is a Figma variable mode — does not change separator role
[fn] roundCaps=false (default) — borderRadius is 0
[fn] roundCaps=true — borderRadius is tokens.shape.pill
[fn] roundCaps=true vertical — borderRadius is tokens.shape.pill
[fn] roundCaps=true with slot="label" — label still visible
[fn] roundCaps=true with slot="icon" — Icon component child still visible
[a11y] outer container has role="separator"
[a11y] outer container has accessibilityRole="none" (native a11y)
[a11y] outer container is accessible=true
[a11y] getByRole("separator") finds the divider
[a11y] aria-orientation="horizontal" on horizontal divider
[a11y] aria-orientation="vertical" on vertical divider
[a11y] accessibilityHint is forwarded to outer container
[a11y] inner line segments are hidden from a11y tree (content path)
[a11y] inner line segments carry importantForAccessibility="no-hide-descendants" (Android)
[a11y] simple line path (no slot) has no a11y-hidden children
[a11y] content path outer container preserves accessible=true
[a11y] vertical divider with slot="label" — separator role + vertical orientation
[bug] BUG-DIV-1: using Figma prop name "slot" silently renders nothing — naming mismatch has real user impact
[bug] BUG-DIV-1: correct native prop "content" DOES render — confirms the fix needed is a rename
[bug] BUG-DIV-2: slot="label" with string children — Text element rendered (correct path)
[bug] BUG-DIV-2: slot="label" with ReactElement children — Text branch bypassed, no label typography
[bug] BUG-DIV-3: default attention="low" gives the lightest stroke — may be invisible
[bug] BUG-DIV-4: inner line segments use "no-hide-descendants" but have no children
